subject: Re: FW: Next Steps For Dana
body:
I appreciate it

> David,
> 
> I recommend that we cast her in the March issue of
> Men's Fitness, in our

> I also believe we should cast her for a March
> fashion page for Shape. 
>

> Best,
> Neal

body_html:
I appreciate it

--- "Pecker, David" dpecker@amilink.com wrote:

Jeffrey, fyi ...

From: Pecker, David
Sent: 11/04/2005 3:10 PM
To: Boulton, Neal
Subject: FW: Next Steps For Dana

Please do it.

Thanks,
David

From: Boulton, Neal
Sent: 11/04/2005 1:00 PM
To: Pecker, David
Subject: Next Steps For Dana

David,

I recommend that we cast her in the March issue of
Men's Fitness, in our
"Get the Girl" section.

I also believe we should cast her for a March
fashion page for Shape.

I can initiate this and ensure it's quality.

Best,
Neal
